      "question": "What happens when you insert a null value into the 'salary' column for an employee with id 101?",
      "options": [
        "The employee's salary is updated to $50000",
        "The employee's salary remains as null",
        "The employee's salary is updated to $60000",
        "The employee's salary is deleted"
      ],
      "correct": 1,
      "explanation": "Inserting a null value into a column does not change the value of the column. It simply
